name: Beef Ziti Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 (16 oz.) can DelMonte cut green beans, drained
1 (11 oz.) can Green Giant Niblets corn, drained
2 (10 3/4 oz.) cans Campbell's condensed golden mushroom soup
1 (14 1/2 oz.) can DelMonte stewed tomatoes (any kind but I prefer the chunky pasta style or Italian style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cook ziti according to package directions; drain.
3. Return cooked ziti and vegetables (green beans and corn) to the cooking pot used to cook ziti.
4. Meanwhile, in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, cook beef until browned, stirring to separate meat; drain fat.
5. Stir in soup, tomatoes, basil, pepper, and garlic to the meat. Heat thoroughly.
6. Add soup mixture to ziti mixture; mix well.
7. Spoon into a greased 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake for 15 minutes.
10. Uncover; sprinkle with cheese.
11. Bake for 5 more minutes or until cheese melts.
